mapper.update: UPDATE item SET sold = sold + #{quantity}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{itemId}
mapper.insert: insert into item (name, price, stock, image, category, brand, spec, status) values (#{name}, #{price}, #{stock}, #{image}, #{category}, #{brand}, #{spec}, #{status})
mapper.update:
update item
name = #{name},
price = #{price},
stock = #{stock},
image = #{image},
category = #{category},
brand = #{brand},
spec = #{spec},
status = #{status},
where id = #{id}
update item set status = #{status}, update_time = NOW() where id = #{id}
